extraction.one_line_summary: VINGEGAARD attacked on the Tourmalet descent, soloed to victory while EVENEPOEL cracked on the opening climb losing 24+ minutes.
tactical_patterns: VINGEGAARD attacked on Tourmalet descent after conservation over two prior climbs, indicating descending finish suits aggression over summit attacks.
KUSS defended red jersey by limiting losses to teammate VINGEGAARD to under 30 seconds despite not matching acceleration.
Quick-Step completely absent from support when EVENEPOEL cracked on Aubisque, suggesting no depth for GC defense on explosive starts.
Jumbo-Visma positioned all three GC riders in top positions before Aubisque summit, making early climb selection decisive for control.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: Dropped on first major climb (Aubisque) in opening hour losing 24+ minutes, indicating either illness or total form collapse.
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: Clawed back significant time after initially distanced by VINGEGAARD, showing resilience under pressure to defend lead.
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: Won stage with descent attack rather than summit acceleration, demonstrating tactical evolution beyond pure climbing dominance.
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: Finished third at 33 seconds, completing Jumbo 1-2-3 and moving into podium position.
rider_signals.BARGUIL Warren: neutral: In early breakaway attempting KOM points despite being KOM leader HERRADA's main threat.
